title: Demo 1: branching chain capture with the same final landing.
description:
Demo 1: branching chain capture with the same final landing.

The white pion on E4 has two capture sequences that both end on E8:
  1) E4 -> G6 -> E8   capturing F5, then F7
  2) E4 -> C6 -> E8   capturing D5, then D7

In the REPL, try:
  > e4 e8
The app lists the matching routes. Choose one with:
  > e4 e8 1
  > e4 e8 2
